'''Ihopek''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] evacuated by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], along with [[Narth]]. While they were being evacuated, the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Gnisnal]]'' was demolished by internal explosions. This provided enormous amounts of information to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], giving them a complete copy of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Order of Battle/Legends|Order of battle]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The planet was mentioned twice in ''[[Before the Storm]]'', called '''Ihopek''' in one instance and '''Ipotek''' in the other. It is unclear which name author [[Michael P. Kube-McDowell]] intended the world to be known as. The former name was the one catalogued in the ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and used in later reference materials.
